back_translation: As for the matter of seasons and time, brothers, it is not necessary that we should write to you.
For you yourselves already know well that the Day of the Lord will come like a thief who comes in the time of night.
While people are saying 'Peace and safety,' at that moment destruction will come upon them suddenly, like labor pain that comes to a pregnant woman, and they will absolutely not escape.
But brothers, you are not in the darkness, such that the day would surprise you like a thief.
For you all are entirely sons of the light and sons of the day. We are not of the night or of the darkness.
Therefore let us not sleep like the others, but let us keep watch and be sober.
For those who sleep, sleep in the time of night, and those who are drunk, are drunk in the time of night.
But since we are people of the day, let us be sober and self-controlled, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and putting on the helmet which is the hope in salvation.
For God has not appointed us for wrath, but for the obtaining of salvation through Jesus Christ our Lord.
Who died for us, so that whether we are awake or have fallen asleep, we will live together with Him.
Therefore encourage one another, and build one another up, just as you are already doing.
Brothers, we appeal to you to recognize the worth of those who labor among you, who lead you in the Lord, and who admonish you.
Hold them in highest esteem with love, because of their work. Live together in peace.
Brothers, we encourage you: admonish those who are out of order, comfort those who are fainthearted, help the weak, and be patient with everyone.
Be careful that no one repays evil for evil to one another, but always strive to do good toward one another and toward all people.
Always rejoice.
Pray without ceasing.
Give thanks in every situation, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.
Do not extinguish the Spirit.
Do not despise prophecy.
But test all things; that which is good, hold to it firmly.
Abstain from every form of evil.
May the God of peace Himself sanctify you completely, and may your spirit, mind, and body be kept entire and without blemish at the coming of Jesus Christ our Lord.
He who calls you is faithful, and He will accomplish it.
Brothers, pray for us also.
Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss.
I charge you in the name of the Lord, to have this letter read to all the brothers.
May the grace of Jesus Christ our Lord remain with you.
